title: adina polycephala
intro: Adina polycephala, also known as the "many-headed Adina" or "multiple headed Adina", is a type of shrub native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Adina polycephala plant are often dried and made into teas or infusions, and can also be used in poultices to treat skin conditions.
